title: Project Report: CodeQuest Grading Agent — Agentic AI Engineer
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
summary: Agent reads student report submission, checks rubric criteria, drafts feedback — human approves before publish.
objectives: Audit log of all agent actions
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Intermediate)*

**CodeQuest Grading Agent** is a intermediate-level end-to-end project for Agentic AI Engineer. Duration: 3–4 weeks. Agent reads student report submission, checks rubric criteria, drafts feedback — human approves before publish. Tools: LangGraph, FastAPI, OpenAI, React.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: Tools: load_report, check_rubric, draft_feedback
Objective: LangGraph state machine
Objective: Human-in-the-loop approval step
Objective: Audit log of all agent actions
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
Agentic AI Engineer portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a Agentic AI Engineer resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a Agentic AI Engineer resume with a demo link.

chapters.content:

- [ ] Rubric scorer

chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Intermediate)*

Submit all final deliverables: Grading agent; Graph diagram; Approval demo; Audit log. Skills demonstrated: LangGraph, HITL, Tool calling. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: Grading agent
Deliverable: Graph diagram
Deliverable: Approval demo
Deliverable: Audit log
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits Grading agent and passes the rubric.
